_comment: daily-cv profile template. Copy this file to PROFILE.json and fill in YOUR real values. PROFILE.json is gitignored and never committed. See profile/README.md and INIT.md for how to populate it. Replace every placeholder below. Delete the _comment fields if you like.

identity._comment_display_name: Exact name order you want on the CV. The generators print this verbatim.
identity._comment_filename_slug: Used in output filenames, e.g. Doe_CV_Acme_20260101.pdf
identity.headline: VP Engineering | SaaS Platform Leader
identity._comment_clearances: Optional. Free text shown in the contact line, e.g. a held security clearance (state historical/active accurately). Leave empty to omit.

contact._comment: Treat these as private. PROFILE.json is gitignored so these are never committed.

summary: Two-sentence professional summary. Lead with your target role title and weave in 2-3 keywords from the job description. Keep factual.
_comment_competencies: 8-12 short keyword phrases, pipe-joined at render time. Mirror the JD's vocabulary.

experience.title: Your Current Title
bullets: Achievement bullet with a concrete, verifiable metric and outcome.
Second achievement bullet, varied length, no fabricated numbers.
Fourth achievement bullet (current role may have up to 4).

experience.title: Previous Title
bullets: Achievement bullet (roles 2-3: up to 3 bullets each).

experience.title: Earlier Title
bullets: Achievement bullet (older roles: up to 2 bullets).

earlier_career: Title - Company (YYYY-YYYY): one-line summary of scope and impact.
Title - Company (YYYY-YYYY): one-line summary of scope and impact.
_comment_earlier_career: Optional. Condensed one-liners for older roles, rendered as a compact paragraph.
_comment_key_metrics: Anti-fabrication ground truth. Every number used in a CV/cover letter MUST come from this list. Add your real, verifiable metrics.
anti_fabrication_notes: Exact title at Company X is '...' (not '...').
Frame the funding/investment fact as '...' (never overstate).
Name order is '...' - verify the wrong order appears 0 times in output.
_comment_anti_fabrication_notes: Per-person guardrails the assistant must respect when tailoring. Optional but recommended.

target_defaults._comment: Defaults for a run when not overridden by CLI/run-config. Edit per application.
